title: Ivy Counts the Sounds
synopsis: Baby Ivy discovers and counts different sounds around her house, from one clock tick to five bird chirps, learning numbers through delightful noises.

pages.text: One tick-tock! Ivy hears the clock.

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes sits on a soft rug, looking up at a wall clock. A single blue wavy line flows from the clock to her ear, visualizing the tick-tock sound.
illustration.alt: Baby Ivy listening to one clock ticking

pages.text: Two meows! The cats say hello.

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes claps her hands as two orange cats approach. Two sets of purple curved lines with small dots flow from each cat's mouth toward Ivy.
illustration.alt: Two cats meowing at baby Ivy

pages.text: Three beeps! The phone is ringing.

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes crawls toward a red telephone. Three bright yellow jagged zigzag lines burst from the phone, showing the sharp beeping sounds.
illustration.alt: Phone making three beeping sounds near baby Ivy

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes sits under a kitchen sink. Four small blue circles with tiny ripple rings show each water drip sound as it hits the sink.
illustration.alt: Water dripping four times while baby Ivy listens

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes looks out a window at five colorful birds. Five rainbow-colored musical note shapes float from the birds toward the window, each a different bright hue.
illustration.alt: Five birds chirping outside the window to baby Ivy

pages.text: Ivy loves counting sounds! One, two, three, four, five!

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes sits in the center of the room with all the sound visualizations around her: blue wavy clock lines, purple cat curves, yellow phone zigzags, blue water circles, and rainbow bird notes creating a beautiful symphony of visible sound.
illustration.alt: Baby Ivy surrounded by all five different sound visualizations

metadata.illustrationStyle: sound made visible, wavy lines for music, jagged lines for crashes, dots for whispers, synesthesia inspired, seeing sound, color and shape for noise, vibration visual

questions.question: How many times does the clock tick?
questions.explanation: The clock goes tick-tock one time!

questions.question: What sound do the cats make?
